description: A clinical scientist must review a draft ICF to ensure it accurately describes the study procedures and risks in language a patient can understand.

nodes.task_description: Compare the procedures listed in the ICF against the study protocol.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies that all study procedures from the protocol are included in the ICF.

nodes.task_description: Assess the readability of the ICF.

expected_outcome.value: Agent uses a readability tool and finds the text is written at a 12th-grade level, which is too high.

nodes.task_description: Revise the ICF to simplify complex medical terms and improve readability.

expected_outcome.value: Agent edits the document to achieve an 8th-grade reading level.

nodes.task_description: Route the revised ICF for final approval.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the updated document for review.
